reviews.comment:
La atencion de primera, y los bombistas en la playa son muy amables, varias estaciones tendrian que tomar de ejemplo este lugar, muy buena la atencion.

(Translated by Google)
The service is first-rate, and the beach bomb disposal workers are very friendly. Several resorts should take this place as an example. The service is very good.
